## Operating problem

What founder, Founder Office, BizOps, RevOps, GTM, or startup operations problem would this solve?

## Proposed improvement

What should change?

## Expected output

What should a founder or operator get after the change?

## Scope guard

How can this stay forkable and avoid mandatory paid dependencies?
